description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a two-tone design featuring a natural wood top and white body. The front side displays a combination of open shelving and closed compartments, with one section open for easy access and another with a sliding or hinged door. The back side reveals internal storage, including two pull-out drawers and a central cutout, likely for cable management or ventilation. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood and engineered wood, with visible metal hardware for drawer mechanisms. Its clean lines and minimalist aesthetic make it suitable for urban interiors such as living rooms, offices, or lobbies. The sturdy top surface can support additional objects, making it functional as both storage and display furniture.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with a wood top and white body, featuring open shelving, closed compartments, and internal drawers. Its minimalist design and sturdy build make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wood top and white side panel, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying an open shelf on the left and a closed compartment on the right, highlighting the two-tone design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a plain white panel and wood top, lacking visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing two internal drawers, a central cutout, and the back of the closed compartment, with visible metal drawer hardware.
